---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new skill or enhancement to an existing one
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
BEFORE FILING: Search open AND closed issues and the existing skills
directory. Many behaviors have been requested before — some are already
covered by an existing skill, some are in progress.
-->

- [ ] I searched existing issues and skills — this has not been proposed before

## What agent behavior problem does this solve?
<!--
Describe the problem from a real session. What was the agent doing,
what did it get wrong or skip, and why did it matter?

"It would be useful if the agent..." is not a problem statement.
Describe what actually broke or went wrong.
-->

## Proposed skill behavior
<!--
What specifically should the agent do differently with this skill loaded?
Be concrete: "Agents will..." not "The skill should..."
-->

## What alternatives did you consider?
<!--
What other skills or approaches could address the same problem?
Why is a new skill better than extending an existing one?
-->

## Is this appropriate for this plugin?
<!--
Would this benefit any AI coding agent working on the JTL project?
If this behavior is specific to one workflow, one tool, or one person's
preference, it may not belong here.
-->

## Environment (required)
<!--
Required. We weigh proposals differently depending on whether they
came from a real session that failed vs. reasoning from documentation.
-->

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Raised by (human / agent) | |
| Harness (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) | |
| Harness version | |
| Model + version (if agent) | |
| Plugins installed | |

## Context
<!-- Optional: session transcript, links, or examples showing the failure. -->
